summary: Tested ZET Mindshare new features: Export PDF button (above pages panel), Word count display, Table panel, Layers panel, Ruler panel, Grid panel, QR Code panel, Watermark panel, Page Numbers panel, Header/Footer panel, Find & Replace panel, Templates panel, Select tool lasso selection, Zoom tool magnifier effect, ZETA AI knowledge of new features, Dashboard quick notes text overflow fix. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: All 24 API tests passed (auth, documents CRUD, notes CRUD, ZETA AI chat/translate, cloud storage)
Frontend: Export PDF button visible above pages panel in RightPanel
Frontend: Word count displays '0 words' (not character count) - getWordCount() uses word splitting
Frontend: Table panel - Rows/Columns sliders (default 3x3), table preview grid, 'Create Table' button
Frontend: QR Code panel (Q shortcut) - 'Enter text or URL' input, 'Generate QR' button
Frontend: Ruler panel (R shortcut) - 'Show Rulers' checkbox, ruler usage hint
Frontend: Zoom panel (Z shortcut) - 'Zoom Level' slider (2x default), 'Lens Size' slider (100px default), magnifier hint
Frontend: Select tool (S shortcut) - Lasso selection mode activated
Frontend: Layers panel - Shows element list (or 'No layers' for empty doc)
Frontend: Grid panel - 'Show Grid', 'Grid Size', 'Snap to Grid' controls
Frontend: Watermark panel - Text input, Opacity slider, 'Apply Watermark' button
Frontend: Page Numbers panel - 'Enable Page Numbers' toggle, position dropdown (Bottom Center/Right/Left)
Frontend: Header/Footer panel - Header and Footer text inputs, Apply button
Frontend: Find & Replace panel - Find input, Replace input, 'Replace All' button
Frontend: Templates panel - Lists CV/Resume, Report, Letter, Invoice, Presentation templates
Frontend: ZETA AI responds correctly about new tools (AI IMAGE, QR CODE, VOICE, TRANSLATE, GRAPHIC, TABLES, TEMPLATES)
Frontend: Dashboard quick notes text overflow fix - break-words, whitespace-pre-wrap, wordBreak applied
critical_code_review_comments: Export PDF button correctly positioned at top of RightPanel with proper data-testid
Word count uses getWordCount() which splits on whitespace and counts words (not characters)
Table creation generates SVG with configurable rows/columns, creates table element on canvas
QR Code uses qrcode library to generate data URL QR codes
Layers panel lists elements with visibility/lock toggles and move up/down buttons
Grid panel controls gridVisible, gridSize, snapToGrid state variables
Select tool activates lasso selection mode (isElementInLasso, isVectorInLasso functions)
Zoom tool has magnifier effect with zoomLevel and zoomRadius state variables
ZETA system message updated with all new tool descriptions
Dashboard.js note cards use break-words whitespace-pre-wrap classes for text overflow fix
seed_data_creation: Created fresh test user/session/document via mongosh
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: (1) Export PDF button above pages, (2) Word count in RightPanel, (3) Table panel with rows/cols sliders, (4) Layers panel with visibility/lock controls, (5) Grid panel with show/size/snap controls, (6) Ruler panel with toggle, (7) QR Code panel with text input and generate button, (8) Watermark panel with opacity, (9) Page Numbers panel with position dropdown, (10) Header/Footer panel with text inputs, (11) Find & Replace panel with search/replace/replace-all, (12) Templates panel listing document templates, (13) Select tool lasso selection, (14) Zoom tool magnifier effect with zoom level and lens size, (15) ZETA AI knowledge updated, (16) Dashboard quick notes overflow fix. Backend tests use session_token=test_session_d260da24d7e1 with user_test_001.
